recommended_next_steps: Harmonize variants and headers with GWASLab before exporting to LDSC, FUMA, or GWAS-SSF.
Resolve failed rows before LDSC, meta-analysis refreshes, or PRS derivation.
Clump retained lead variants with PLINK 2.0 before reporting independent loci.
Interpret the retained genome-wide significant loci with FUMA or a comparable locus-to-gene layer.
If you need an exchange or submission format, export the cleaned results toward the GWAS Catalog summary-statistics standard.

recommended_resources.reason: Use for header normalization, harmonization, palindromic-SNP handling, and format conversion.
Use for clumping, filtering, and downstream GWAS follow-up.
Use after harmonization for SNP-heritability and genetic-correlation analyses.
Use for SNP2GENE and gene-set interpretation once lead loci are stable.
Use for canonical summary-statistics field expectations and downstream interchange.
